_comment: Template for the Langfuse MCP server. Copy to your repo root as .mcp.json or run skills/langfuse/scripts/install-mcp.sh to do it idempotently. The Authorization header references ${LANGFUSE_BASIC_AUTH}, which must be exported in your shell as: $(printf '%s:%s' "$LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY" "$LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY" | base64). Swap the URL for your region (us|jp|hipaa) or self-hosted host.
